name: ghzaiel-food
description: Full-stack restaurant web application for Ghzaiel Food.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.hostinger:build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
